{{Quote|All by his lonesome, he'd found a previously hidden droid factory, fired it up and cranked out his own private army of battle droids.|Anonymous 501st clone trooper, on Gizor Dellso|<ref name="Star Wars: Battlefront II">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref>}}
'''Gizor Dellso's army''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Army/Legends|army]] that [[Gizor Dellso]] created using a [[Techno Union droid factory/Legends|hidden droid factory]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] used it to combat the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The army consisted of [[OOM-series battle droid/Legends|OOM-series battle droids]], [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1s]], [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2s]], [[Droideka/Legends|Droidekas]] and [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|MagnaGuards]]. In response, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] [[Battle of Mustafar (Imperial Period)|sent]] the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] him and shut down his entire operation. In the [[Battle of Mustafar (Imperial Period)|Battle of Mustafar]], the droids were deactivated and the factory was destroyed, making sure no more could be manufactured.

[[File:BF_Mustafar_6.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The [[501st Legion]] annihilated Dellso's army.]]
In addition to the droid army, Dellso developed a new [[Confederate infantry prototype]]. The schematics for it were destroyed with the rest of the factory.
